Es mi ACA

It's my ACA

reviews.comment:
La atención deja mucho que desear, cómo socio del ACA no me siento bien atendido, nadie limpia los vidrios de mi auto, pero termino de cargarme nafta y fue a su auto a limpiarselos que estaba estacionado en la vereda.

(Translated by Google)
The service leaves much to be desired. As an ACA member, I don't feel well taken care of. Nobody cleans my car windows, but after I fill up my tank, they go to their car to clean them while it's parked on the sidewalk.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1N05HalJ3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It's always excellent, fast, and friendly. I don't charge anywhere else.
